steps.t: A cold wind blows from the north-west of town. You should speak to the Uruk in the north-west of Byre Tor.
Run away from Núrzum! You should approach the glowing path markers.
Núrzum is close behind! You should run in the opposite direction.
Run east, away from Núrzum's forces!
Run north, to the edge of Byre Tor.
Jump off the edge of Byre Tor's cliff.
